hooks.command: if jq -r '.tool_input.command' | grep -qE 'git push.*(main|origin main|origin HEAD:main)'; then cd /Users/marcpanu/Code/prod/obsidian-mobile-explorer && if ! npm run lint 2>&1; then echo '{"continue": false, "reason": "ESLint failed — fix lint errors before pushing to main"}'; exit 0; fi; fi
